svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="multi-threaded-arch"> <mxGraphModel dx="1414" dy="751" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="450" pageHeight="700" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="Node_1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontFamily=Lucida Console;" value="Client<div>(curl/Browser)</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="20" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Edge_1_2" edge="1" parent="1" source="Node_1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontFamily=Lucida Console;" target="Node_2" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Node_2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontFamily=Lucida Console;" value="Server (Server++)<div>- sockets (bind)</div><div>- accept clients loop</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="20" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Edge_2_TP" edge="1" parent="1" source="Node_2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontFamily=Lucida Console;" target="Node_TP" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Node_TP" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontFamily=Lucida Console;fillColor=default;strokeColor=default;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=12;fontColor=default;" value="Thread Pool (jthread)<div>- queue&lt;tasks&gt;</div><div>- Worker Threads</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="20" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Edge_TP_4" edge="1" parent="1" source="Node_TP" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontFamily=Lucida Console;" target="Node_4" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Node_4" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontFamily=Lucida Console;" value="Router (Router)<div>- routes[]</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="20" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Edge_4_6" edge="1" parent="1" source="Node_4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontFamily=Lucida Console;" target="Node_6" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Node_6" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontFamily=Lucida Console;" value="Handler (user code)<div>- receives http_req</div><div>- mutates http_res</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="20" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Edge_6_8" edge="1" parent="1" source="Node_6" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontFamily=Lucida Console;" target="Node_8" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Node_8" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontFamily=Lucida Console;" value="Response serialized<div>-&gt; socket send()</div><div>-&gt; close()</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="20" y="620" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Label_TCP" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font face="Lucida Console">TCP (HTTP)</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="100" x="120" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Label_MainThread" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font face="Lucida Console">Main Thread: Enqueues<br>client_fd &amp; loops</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="200" x="240" y="155" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Label_Worker" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font face="Lucida Console">Worker Thread: Wakes up,<br>pops fd &amp; processes</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="200" x="240" y="275" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Label_Router" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font face="Lucida Console">middlewares run in order<br>path -&gt; Route.match()</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="200" x="240" y="395" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
